log: Ingested 1,432 signals from X/Twitter, PMD sensors, and Traffic nodes. Normalized unstructured text into spatial vectors.
Identified anomalous correlation between G-10 water levels and traffic gridlock. Instantiated crisis model ISL-FLOOD-001. Calculated severity: 87.
Evaluated federal reserve vs local limits. Reallocated 2 Ambulances from I-8 (Heat) to G-10 (Flood). Warning: I-8 medical capacity critically low.
Ran 5,000 Monte Carlo routing permutations. Determined Srinagar Hwy rerouting reduces response time by 11 mins.
Flagged Telegram report SIG-006 (G-10 Dam Collapse) as LOW CREDIBILITY. No corroborating satellite data. Initiating false alarm retraction.
